name: Arjun Sharma
summary: Personalized 14-step study plan targeting 3 weak areas with progressive difficulty.

steps.description: Theory explanation and conceptual understanding for a topic

steps.description: Speed drill — 10 rapid questions, focus on response time

steps.reasoning: Attempt rate is 76.9% — too many questions are being skipped. Option elimination practice will help attempt more questions confidently.
